name: Stripe
data_shared: customer email, shipping address for receipts, order amount, PaymentIntent ID; no raw PAN handled by FreshCart
notes: Stripe Elements + webhooks; signature verification enforced; secrets in AWS Secrets Manager

name: SendGrid
data_shared: email address, name, order status/receipt data (no payment details)
notes: Marketing emails are out of scope; DKIM/SPF configured

name: Cloudflare
data_shared: IP address, request metadata, cached static assets
notes: OWASP ruleset at medium; custom rate limits on /login and /checkout

name: Sentry
data_shared: stack traces, request IDs, sanitized request context (PII scrubbing on)

name: PostHog
data_shared: anonymous ID, event names, device/browser metadata (IP anonymized)
notes: Consent gating for EU; hosted in EU region

name: AWS
data_shared: application data at rest (RDS), logs, backups, object storage (S3)
notes: Shared responsibility model; encryption at rest enabled
